query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "active learners as efficient prp rerankers" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (reranking generated hypotheses to optimize downstream metrics) and domain (efficient text generation with LLMs) as the user's question, even though it proposes a specific lattice-encoding method (EEL) rather than the "Active Learners" approach mentioned in the user's title. It provides essential prior work on the efficiency and methodology of reranking, which is the central topic of the user's research.
